_schema_notes: PLACEHOLDER DATA — this file is the weekly curation output. Every event needs a source_url (the venue post or page you verified it from) before verified can be true. date: YYYY-MM-DD. Expired events are hidden automatically by the app, so it is safe to leave past events in the file for a while. price: 0 = free, null = unknown.
